Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
T-MSIS TAF Annual Provider RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.3 
112 
PRVDR_MDCD_CHIP_ENRLMT_CD 
LABEL: 
Provider State Plan Enrollment Code (Medicaid and/or CHIP) 
DESCRIPTION: The state plan with which a provider has an affiliation and can provide services to the state’s fee for 
service enrollees. 
SHORT NAME: PRVDR_MDCD_CHIP_ENRLMT_CD 
LONG NAME: PRVDR_MDCD_CHIP_ENRLMT_CD 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
1 
FILE(S): 
APR enrollment 
SOURCE:
